introduce.description: AI Barber turns a single photo into a hairstyle transformation video so you can preview cut, color, volume, and movement before making a real hair decision.

usage.title: How to Create an AI Hairstyle Video
usage.description: Generate a photo to hairstyle video in four simple steps:

image.alt: How to create an AI hairstyle video

items.title: Upload a Clear Portrait Photo
items.description: Use a front-facing photo with good lighting so the generator can read your face shape, hairline, and starting hairstyle accurately.

image.alt: Upload portrait photo for hairstyle video

items.title: Choose the Hairstyle Direction
items.description: Pick the haircut or hair color idea you want to test, such as curtain bangs, a textured crop, a short bob, long waves, or a fade.

items.title: Describe the Transformation
items.description: Add details like length, texture, part, color, shine, volume, and motion so the before-and-after clip better matches the result you want.

items.title: Generate, Compare, and Download
items.description: Create your hairstyle video, review the motion preview, then download the clip to save, share, or bring to your next salon visit.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: FAQs about AI hairstyle videos, photo-to-video workflow, downloadable clips, and how to get the most realistic preview.
faq.tip: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team

items.question: What is an AI hairstyle video generator?
items.answer: It is an online tool that turns your photo and hairstyle description into a short motion preview, so you can see a haircut or hair color change before making it real.

items.question: Can I create a hairstyle video from just one photo?
items.answer: Yes. Upload a clear portrait photo and the tool can generate a photo to hairstyle video without requiring video editing experience.

items.question: What kind of hairstyles can I preview in video?
items.answer: You can test short and long cuts, layers, fades, bangs, curly styles, sleek looks, and hair color changes such as blonde, brown, black, copper, or fashion shades.

items.question: Why use a hairstyle video instead of only a picture?
items.answer: A video helps you judge movement, softness, volume, and how the hairstyle frames your face. That is especially useful for bangs, layers, curls, and before-and-after comparisons.

items.question: Can I download the hairstyle transformation clip?
items.answer: Yes. Once your result is ready, you can download the video clip and keep it as a haircut reference or share it with your barber, stylist, or friends.

items.question: Can I show the video to my barber or salon?
items.answer: Yes. The downloadable clip is designed to be easy to share, making it much simpler to communicate the haircut shape, color direction, and overall vibe you want.

items.question: What photos work best for a realistic hairstyle video?
items.answer: Use a front-facing photo with good lighting, a visible hairline, and minimal face obstruction. Clear portraits usually produce better hairstyle motion previews than dark or angled photos.

items.question: Can I preview hair color changes in motion?
items.answer: Yes. You can describe color updates such as blonde, copper, black, red, silver, or highlight-inspired looks and review how the new shade reads in a moving clip.

items.question: Do I need editing skills or video software?
items.answer: No. The workflow is fully online. You upload a photo, describe the style change, and generate the hairstyle video directly in your browser.

items.question: How long does it take to generate a hairstyle video?
items.answer: Most hairstyle videos are ready within a few minutes, depending on the selected model, your input, and current generation demand.

items.question: Is my uploaded photo handled securely?
items.answer: We take privacy seriously. Your uploaded media is processed for generation and handled securely, and it is not shared with third parties.
